note: Mathlib/Topology/MetricSpace/GromovHausdorff.lean:86 defines GHSpace = nonempty compact metric spaces up to isometry with `instance : MetricSpace GHSpace where` at line 394 (dist = ghDist, defined line 176) — the Gromov-Hausdorff distance itself, so convergence in this metric (generic Tendsto/nhds machinery) literally is Gromov-Hausdorff convergence; restricted to the compact case (no pointed/non-compact GH convergence in Mathlib).

Path verified as key libraries.Mathlib.modules.Analysis.sub.SpecialFunctions.sub.Trigonometric in catalog/data/hierarchy.json. Directory holds Real.sin/cos/tan/cot/sec/csc and their Complex counterparts plus all standard identities (Basic.lean, Inverse.lean, ArctanDeriv.lean, etc.) — the formal home for the trigonometric-functions family as a whole (no single decl captures the plural concept).

Mathlib/LinearAlgebra/CrossProduct.lean:110-113, docstring literally: 'The scalar quadruple product identity, related to the Binet-Cauchy identity.' States (u×v)·(w×x) = (u·w)(v·x) − (u·x)(v·w) for R^3 via the cross product — the n=3 special case of the general n-dimensional Binet-Cauchy identity (sum over 2-subsets of minors), not the general identity itself.

Mathlib/Combinatorics/SimpleGraph/Clique.lean:983: `noncomputable def indepNum (G : SimpleGraph α) : ℕ := sSup {n | ∃ s, G.IsNIndepSet n s}` — exactly the independence number α(G), with card_le_indepNum/exists_isNIndepSet_indepNum/maximumIndepSet_card_eq_indepNum lemmas around it; corroborated by existing fc_link rows in this repo citing G.indepNum for the same QID.

Mathlib/Combinatorics/SimpleGraph/Clique.lean:719: `noncomputable def cliqueNum (G : SimpleGraph α) : ℕ := sSup {n | ∃ s, G.IsNClique n s}` — exactly the clique number ω(G), with IsClique.card_le_cliqueNum/exists_isNClique_cliqueNum/maximumClique_card_eq_cliqueNum lemmas around it; corroborated by existing fc_link row in this repo citing this decl for the same QID.

Mathlib/Topology/Compactness/Lindelof.lean:482: `class LindelofSpace (X : Type*) [TopologicalSpace X] : Prop where` (module docstring: 'LindelofSpace X: X is Lindelöf if it is Lindelöf as a set') — the direct formalization of a Lindelöf topological space, with NonLindelofSpace, HereditarilyLindelofSpace and the full IsLindelof API alongside it.
